Is it possible to have the inner peace and it would leave? Adano: And leave? No, no, you can have miracle and the powers to perform it and that can leave you if you have a blow on the head, but the inner peace is rooted in the atomic structure of your nature, right into the cells itself. Audience: (inaudible) Adano: Well the first evidence of the inner peace is a gradual shedding of the grossness of the physical body. The body becomes soft and smooth. It becomes like velvety feeling. You begin to notice this transformation occurring in the cells and you begin to notice that the hostility of the mind is going out. It’s an inner peace that is brought about within the cellular structure so that when you have it completely, you can be 100 years of age and have a physical body under medical examination, equivalent to a baby. We’re talking of that kind of peace. Not too long ago I was fortunate to meet a man, give and take a few years, they say he’s 150, but I say 100 and he was examined by an American doctor and the doctor is amazed that this man’s body function, skin, texture, and everything is like a little child and he does radiate this peace. So we’re talking of an inner peace brought about by a biological transformation. If it’s psychological, it’ll go away. 0:58 Adano: Yes? Audience: Swami you mentioned the feeling of electrical vibrations entering into the body, can you explain what this is? Adano: God is life and life is energy. Now how would you experience energy? What would be the sensation? You’re familiar with energy in the form of electricity, right? Now how would you know it’s really electricity? The best test is to put your finger in the socket. What would it feel like, huh (laughter from audience), a tingling shock? Well those who have had any spiritual healing will tell you their whole body quivers, sometime they’re knocked out cold with it. So we don’t want to lose our composure in a group meeting or go off into some frenzy or hysteria. So the mere fact that you can feel this electrical impulse which is life pulsating and passing through is an indication to you that you’re on the wavelength of that Divine current. Now it’s a matter of identifying and living with it consciously then as you live with it consciously, your whole body will be vibrating with it all the time. Now when the Holy Spirit descended upon the twelve disciples, or the eleven at the time, they also felt this wave of current in their bodies and I’ve seen Pentecostal conversion, it’s a wave that comes right through. 1:00 I met a woman one time, she was a nurse and she was baptized by the Holy Spirit through Pentecostal and she went on to do more studies in spiritual life until she was ready for initiation and the night we were initiating her, when I touched her she almost went into this state again, but because of her pride and the people in the room, she held on and refused to go into the state. When she was all over she said to me, “You know I could’ve gone back again talking in tongues because it was the same feeling, but I didn’t want to make myself look like a fool in front of everybody so I held on and started to bite my teeth, squirm in my shoes, so that I wouldn’t have the sensation and then it stopped.” I said, “Oh you foolish woman, when the Lord wants to give you His joy, why you block it?” It was only a confirmation of having it here or having it on the Pentecostal experience, the fact that Spirit is Spirit. I said, “You might have blocked out a marvelous experience or a communication or some message for many people who might have needed that message simply because of your pride and being afraid to go through the experience.” So I says, “Next time when you’re having some gift from God, don’t block it.” But she describes it just as an electrical wave. 1:02 Adano: Yes? Audience: Earlier today you spoke about the saliva in the mouth creating (inaudible). You said you were going to expand upon it? Adano: The saliva in the mouth, if you have a blow on that spot, there’s a shock there and if you take the tongue and pass it over that spot or the saliva, it will start to alleviate and the electrical polarity will start a release. Gradually there is some form of electrolytic action occurring in that spot. Now you notice little children when they bang their knees, mother comes over and rubs it and then (Adano makes a sound), does something like that and baby is all right. All right, don’t you see animals doing the same thing too, they lick their wound in some form? The saliva is medicinal in some form and it does neutralize. Let’s see how the saliva is very potent in a realized person. There was a blind man that was brought to Jesus and He spit on the ground. Now you imagine you standing there and looking at Him and let’s say you’re a Greek Centurion or a Roman Centurion, and all the rest are all native Hebrew people, and being a man of authority looking at this exhibition of saliva being spit on the ground, take His finger and (inaudible) with it and make a putty and stick it on a man’s eye and then the guy eyes open up. You’d say to yourself, “How crude, how uncouth, dirtiness,” but heal. 1:04 I heard an interesting statement made to a young man by a certain teacher. He went to this man and asked for a healing. You know what the man told him to get? He says, “You get yourself some pigeons and get the hot blood and squirt it in your back and you’ll be well.” Now this is a modern city where this information was given to the man, but the man didn’t attempt it yet, you see? Now imagine if someone went to Mr. Cayce when he was having his readings and then he was told by him, “Well I’ll tell you what, get your mother to spit in the ground and massage your back.” (Adano laughing). You may say, “What’s wrong with Mr. Cayce?” But certain things do require the most unorthodox ways of getting it done. 1:05 All right in the case of Sri Yukteswar and his teacher. Sri Yukteswar went to his teacher and told his teacher that “a brother disciple is dying, we need your help.” So the teacher looked at him and says, “He will be well, he will be well, the doctors are doing their job, he will be well.” So he went back and when he went back the man was almost dead and the doctor says, “There is nothing we can do for him, your friend will be dead in a few minutes.” So the man died and Sri Yukteswar was torn up. He went to see his teacher and he blurted out his information, he says, “See I came to you and I asked for help and now the man is dead. What good is it?” So the teacher says, “I didn’t know you wanted something from me specifically. Alright, I told you he would be well, but I didn’t understand you. I’ll tell you what you do. You take that castor oil over there and go put seven drops in his mouth. He’ll come back alive.” So Sri Yuktesway look at castor oil and you know, according to Cayce you can put it in your tummy and put some heat packs. Well here is somebody telling him to go put seven drops in the dead man’s mouth. He takes the seven drops and puts it in the dead man’s mouth, the man gets up and he goes and sees Sri Yukteswar and he goes and sees the teacher, Sri Yukteswar. Well Sri Yukteswar is puzzled. He says, “How come seven drops of castor oil did that?” So the teacher said, “In the future now, anytime you see a dead man, just put seven drops of castor oil in his mouth.” As if seven drops of castor oil would immediately heal him. 1:07 When certain unusual techniques are given by people for certain conditions, it is simply to establish a link, but magnetically speaking and electrically speaking, the saliva can release tension and at the same time can heal a wound. I’ve seen it done and so I know it does heal the wound. Audience: Is that why your mouth feels electrified at times, your saliva? Adano: Well in certain states of meditation, in certain states of meditation your mouth does feel like an electrical charge inside and the saliva feels very thick and if you keep on meditating then the saliva becomes now very sweet. Yes, it becomes sweet after a long period of meditation and this sweetness is exactly like the nectar from a flower. Now you know in the ancient days they said the Greeks lived on nectar or ambrosia, the gods. The Greek gods were living on it. 1:09 Now let’s look at it in terms of a man who has attained realization by method of love, devotion, or meditation. This nectar will flow down, it’s within the brain, it comes down into the mouth and you can experience it. Now they say when you die, you will go to the land of where? Milk and honey, pretty sticky, but this is what they say in your scriptures, you want to die to go to the land of milk and honey, but we have to look at that symbology very clearly in terms of healing. When we die to the senses within this mechanism, our consciousness is drawn up to the pineal gland and in the pineal gland there is a viscous substance just like honey, the color of honey, and the taste of honey that is secreted by the gland and in the medulla there is a white liquid, the color of milk, the texture of milk, these two combine now and flow down. When they flow down the body is nourished. Those Yogis or Saints who have practiced the Holy Breath long enough to trigger it off can then live without eating. They may eat or they may not eat or they may just continue their lives with just drinking a little water or liquid to stay in the body to show you that they’re here and they exist. Now Jesus said, “I have meat that you know not of.” He also knew how to tap this energy down and bring it down and it’s all locked up in the saliva too. Now we know in the saliva there are certain properties, enzymes in them, that breaks down substances. Yet we don’t know enough of the enzymes what they will do. We only know of what appears to be happening when food goes in. If there is no food in the system, the enzymes have a different work to do. Instead of breaking down food for energy now, they begin to release energy, but then we will need experiment to verify that. The enzymes will begin to feed you now. They will start emitting a different chemical into the body to feed you. 1:11 Whatever they will do on a physical level, they can do on an extrasensory level. It’s all locked up in there. The same body odor that is (gap in tape)… reverse action of devotion. Now if you are in a state of anger or tension, they say the body odor is very foul, right? You know those advertisement, the only reason you need Ban is because you got tension, and that’s a body odor deodorant you know? Alright, it’s because you have tension. No tension, how would the body odor be? It should be sweet, clean. If there is no impurities in this mechanism as a human being, the glandular system will secrete the opposite, just as much as your endocrine system will secrete certain chemicals to generate hostility, they can now secrete chemicals to generate opposite of hostility. The saliva is the same. If you know that this person is injured and you can concentrate and release the saliva, you can do something with it. It has a certain magnetic charge that will work. 1:13 Audience: Swami you mentioned to meditation upon a form of God that you hold dear. You mentioned the Christians have Christ, the Hindus have Krishna, etc. What form of God should a person of the Jewish faith meditate upon, which holds God as formless? Adano: If you go back to the Talmud, it tells you, “no man has seen God but His…” What? Light. Man has seen the Light of God. Now in the early days when they were carrying the Ark and around the Ark they saw a light like a cloud surrounding the Ark and that was to tell the people that God was present. Now the Hindus also believed just like the Hebrew people, some of them don’t want any form of God, but they all admit whoever they are, the formless God is Light. Now let’s look at the man Jesus. He tried to remove the glorification of His body by saying, “When thine eyes are single, your whole body is full of light.” Meditation is to focus the eyes or to steady the mind in order to see light. Einstein comes along and says, “This is light! Atomic energy, matter.” Matter is equal to the mass times the velocity of light squared. Energy is it… energy is equal to this mass times the velocity of light squared, light, atomic light. So when you close your eyes, light is there. Now Jesus is giving us the indication of what is happening inside. If you don’t want the form and when you see your Higher Self, you will see light. This form is there too. 1:15 The light is there and the Light is shining in the Darkness. That means God’s Light, which is His true nature, is already shining within you, the darkness of the brain, “and the darkness comprehends it not.” The five senses does not understand why there should be light in the brain, but if you doubt in your mind that there’s any light in your brain, it’s very easy to convince yourself by giving you a karate chop on the nostril and you see the light pretty fast. (Laughter from audience.) So that is the evidence on a physical level that light is there. “But let your light so shine before men that they may see the good works now and glorify the Father which is in thee.” The Father in thee is the light, the total structure of this mechanism. On a conscious level when you close your eyes you see some vague movement of a light or a color in there, not conscious of what it represent, you pay no attention to it. When the mind is steady enough to look at it objectively without fear, then you and the light become one. Now if you and the light become one, what would be obvious picture you would see in the end? You will see yourself. 1:16 You are made in the image of that light and if you look at your image, your true self is for the first time looking at yourself, then you can say without doubt, “I and my Father are one.” That is the ideal image in the end. Now the Hebrew and many Hindus start off worshipping God as Light, finally coming to the full realization and shouting to the top of their head, “I and my Father are one.” Eventually Moses had to experience that. Moses said he saw a burning bush. What is a burning bush? It’s a light. This is the only symbology they could relate. He closed his eyes and saw this light burning from here in the Arjuna center, or the third eye center, and as he saw the light inside he constantly meditated upon it. As he meditated upon that, which you call Mount Sinai, it’s the mountain here, as he looked inside within his own consciousness and the light became brighter and brighter, then he said, “Who are thee Lord? What is Your name?” And the voice came back from his own inner being saying, “I am that I am.” You and I are the one in other words, I am you and you are me. You are light and I am light. We are all light. If you are seeing this you are seeing the light. Now it’s difficult for Moses to go down and tell the people in captivity that the God name is “I am.” They would not accept that because they did not have the inner experience that their own God self was functioning in them. 1:18 They had to have some relationship, some thing to relate to. So Moses had to come down another level. He had to meet the people at a level that they could communicate with. So he said Yehovah, the Lord. Yet it shows that even they who lived so long in captivity, could not accept Yehovah / Lord. Even when they were lead out of the captivity, they had to latch on some other form to build up devotion. While Moses was up in the mountain trying to bring down more consciousness, the people then chose a form that was obvious. They melted down all the gold and made themselves a golden calf, a form to relate to, because they so ingrained in their captivity to some form. Finally, when it was all smashed up and the forms were all destroyed, they had to face themselves. So the very first commandment is, “Thou shall have no other gods or graven image before Me.” Me who? Me, Light, the Cosmic Principle, the Creative Intelligence. So the final résumé is that when you look inside yourself as a human being devoid of every religious heritage, since some of us don’t want to be affiliated with religious heritages anymore, we want to look at ourselves as Human Beings (Adano emphasizes these words), then we have to look at ourselves in the atomic nature now for the first time. We have to accept our atomic structure. If we accept it then we will see ourselves as pure light. 1:20 Now in terms of intimacy in that pure light, you will still have to look at a human being, which is yourself, see? God, though He is impersonal and though He is permeating you and you a human being, will hanker or yearn for intimacy, you see? So it is nothing wrong to accept the form of human being, it is not degrading you. In fact, it is extending your comprehension of yourself to see that God is recognizable in human form as a ideal way to relate. It’s unimportant if one chooses Jesus, Mohammed, or Buddha, or anyone, the important thing is all these eventually say, “I and my Father are one.” When it happened to Kabir, Kabir was a Saint who lived many years ago and He had studied all the various religions in the world at the time. He embraced them all. Finally when the final devotion came for Him to practice devotion, one day He woke up out of His meditation and shouted, “I am He! I am He!” And he ran through the marketplace shouting, “I am He!” And they all thought He was crazy. Then one priest says, “Yes, me too.” (Laughter from audience). And this is true, the final realization is the “I am He.” We’re understanding it deeper everyday that realization of God is looking at your higher self and don’t be afraid of it. 1:22 Audience: (inaudible)… interesting point that I’ve never heard before about God the creative light having a form like ours. He said that beyond light (inaudible)… he couldn’t explain it either (inaudible)… call it pure Spirit and there is something beyond that even and it really threw some of us because (inaudible)… involved with this light, we’ve got it made. It might take several lifetimes. Adano: I said before, remember the words are very specific, “No man has seen his God, but has seen His Light.” Now I’ll tell you something else which is entirely different to what I’ve said, “In the beginning was the Word and the Word was with God and the Word IS God and the Word was made flesh and dwelt in Man.” That’s a big difference than the light. He did not say the light is God. “No man has seen God, but His light” and I’m saying now that the Word is God, the Audible Life Current, the Shabda or the Holy Name or Cosmic Sound, the Divine Presence is God. That is heard, not seen, big difference. One has to hear God, one may not see God, but see His light. So the sound precedes the light, but God is all music, that’s why It’s beyond the light. What is beyond the light is this cosmic sound that is responsible for the light being existing. In the highest state of awareness, Anaam Loka (sp?), where Man fully sees God as himself, there He is the eternal sound vibrating. 1:24 In Anaam Lok it is called the state of the eternal mercy. Without it there is no compassion, there is no grace and it’s in that state the unutterable Naam (sp?) or sound is made audible for man for the first time and from that state descends light, coming down like a golden rain causing creation to begin. In the first expression of creation is Beingness acting on Beingness, then the next level down is Beingness acting on Consciousness. The third level down is Consciousness acting on Consciousness. The fourth level down is Consciousness acting on Energy. The fifth level down is Energy acting on Energy. The sixth level down is Consciousness acting on Matter. The seventh level down is Energy acting on Matter and the final level down is where we are, Matter acting on Matter. Do you see where you are in creation? But Anaam Lok, the eternal mercy, is the pure cosmic audible sound. It is the God process. You call it the Logos or your call it the Amen, whatever name you want to call it, but it’s the audible Life Current. This life, Creative Intelligence, that is audible for the first time and it’s heard, not seen. The only level you can see it is when it starts to radiate down as light. 1:26 Therefore in the pineal gland, the sound is vibrating at a level of experience at the point between the eyebrow it’s light. It’s shining in the darkness. Turning the senses in and looking in for the first time, that is what we see, the light, but it’s not the light that gets us back to God because the light is not God, the light is the image of God. It’s the sound, the actual vibratory power that is God. Through that we are drawn back up and we have to experience it. So that’s the big difference between the light and the sound. Audience: Have you had an experience (can’t be heard). I mean would you (can’t be heard) that experience? Adano: (Adano gives Darshan) Master Jesus said, “Those who have eyes to see let them see and ears to hear let them hear.” This is my answer. Audience: (Can’t be heard) Adano: If it’s interference there is something beyond it all and you can hear it right in this room. It’s right behind. There’s a big difference between hearing and listening, but you can hear it, the audible Life Current inside. 1:28 Audience: You said (inaudible), but the way I understand it the Eastern religions say we should become involved in Mankind (inaudible). Adano: Eastern religion is highly involved in Mankind. In fact there was one scientist who said, “the Easterner is more materialistic than the Westerner” because the Westerner is not materialistic, he’s spiritual, he destroys everything and hope God will replace it (laughter from audience), but the Easterner is too concerned that destroying anything he can’t afford for God to replace it. See? We pollute everything and pray to God to replace it so that’s our Western approach. Our Eastern approach, we dare not destroy anything. We dare not pollute anything because we don’t know if He gonna replace it. So who’s more materialistic? 1:29 Audience: But I’m not talking about materialism, I’m talking about involvement. Adano: Well the involvement, this is what we’re talking of the involvement, is not to destroy, is to get into the whole movement. The more we are involved with it, the more we get to touch the thing and handle it and get involved, this is what we’re talking. The Eastern teachers came back to the… out of their caves to get involved with Mankind. This is what they’ve done, they’ve come out of their caves and they’re involving themselves with Mankind. You know, Jesus was an Easterner you know, He wasn’t a Westerner. Did you know that? He was born in the Middle East. So we are kind of afraid to look at the thing about spiritual teachers. All the great teachers of truth were Orientals. We are hoping that the next teacher of truth will be a Westerner. This is not to criticize, we hope that this will happen. Now when Ramakrishna was in the body, this was an Eastern teacher, he was the teacher of a man called Swami Vivekananda who was the first Indian master to come to this country at the invitation of the Parliament of Religions and before he died, his disciples asked him, “Sir, can you tell us where you will be born in your next incarnation?” And they said he looked over the Ganges from the rooftop of the house and for a long time, then he turned around and says, “I have not yet visited the West.” So Vivekananda understood what that meant that to lay the groundwork for the master again, or his master, was to come to the West and the Vivekananda Society, which is the Vedanta Society, has spread a great deal in this country and in Europe, laying the groundwork that someday those students of truth may be the fortunate parent of Ramakrishna whenever he decides to come to the West or born in the West. We will have many masters born in the West of caucasian body. 1:31 Audience: Is there none already born in the West of the stature of Ramakrishna? Adano: Not yet, we are are hoping. Audience: (inaudible) Adano: Life itself, life makes this rose possible. The vital power of the universe makes this rose possible. Yet this vital power is audible. It can be heard and it will take the shape of the human voice and communicate to us. Yogananda one time said, he was visiting with a Saint in India and while they were meditating they heard constantly the voice of God talking to the Saint, that this audible current was giving out the different levels of consciousness to him and whenever he asked a question, this audible sound was loud in the room and at that time he was not even evolved enough to even to hear it himself, but this was occurring very loud and clear around this Saint. Years after when he was able to listen to the sound within himself and hear it, it began to occur around him. 1:33 Not too long, I visited with a disciple of his, an American, who knew that the Master Yogananda would go into the back of the garden where he lived in California and he would tell the disciple, “Don’t let no one disturb me.” Now the boy knew that there were no other beings back of that garden except Yogananda so he would stand up there and between the hedge and Yogananda, he would be there to prevent anyone going into the garden and he said he heard the voices of Saints talking to Yogananda and some of the voices he recognized because when Yogananda addressed them as they appeared to him and communication went on between the two of them, human voices were going on. One time he said he heard Yogananda says, “I’m happy to greet you oh Guru Nanak” and the voice says, “Yes, I’m happy to greet you now since you’ve made every effort to come to this level.” And many such conversations occurred as Saints appeared to him and this boy was fortunate to hear it. Now he said he could actually describe these voices, they were so resonant and different in every time they spoke, so he heard. Now if he had seen, this would be different too. 1:35 Now there was another teacher who came not too long from India and he was somewhere back East here and he was sitting on a rock and they saw him talking just to the empty tree, between the tree and the rock. So his student ventured to go out and ask him, “Sir, who are you talking to?” And he replied, “I’m speaking to Kabir.” So the student says, “I don’t see him.” Well the teacher said, “Alright, you shall have the blessing.” And he touched the boy on the head. He not only saw Kabir standing there, but he heard Kabir held a lengthy discourse on the inner realms with the man and what was going on in the inner realms and the first time he saw Kabir he was in doubt of hallucination. He was in doubt that he might be hypnotized by the teacher. It was until a week after someone had a picture of what Kabir looked like and it was the same man he had seen. Now Kabir spoke very thick accent in his language and those who grew up in the area of where Kabir was supposed to grow up, the boy was fortunate to go back and visit that area in India and that very area, and he tried to investigate, and they knew of the Saint Kabir where he lived and they told him from the language and from the people in that area, they all spoke with the same type of accent. So God is not only light, He is Sound, but this is the sound that became flesh because they said the Word became flesh and dwelt in Man. This audible life current is in Man. We have to make the attempt to get it. Ok. (Applause) 1:37 (inaudible) … for attending and my generous host and his wife for having us here and all the friends. Also we’re looking forward to few days we are here and that we’re having an initiation and if the Lord willing you may show up. Thank you. (End of tape)

Adano72_05_08_1TheInitiateLifeQ1RR -

Adano72_05_08_2TheInitiateLifeQ1RR -

Adano72_05HealingandPrayerTechniqueQ3 - 0:58 Divine will flowing through me…

Adano72_06_11_1TylerRetreatReincarnationQ3 -

Adano72_06_26InitiatesQ1NW2 -

Adano72_09_0HouseholderQ1NW4 - Chanting at beginning, then meditation, then a prayer, “Divine will, flowing through us, will dissolve and eliminate all those conditions that interfere with the normal and harmonious flow of Tom Dodd. Divine will, flowing through us, will strengthen and rebuild all those conditions that interfere and are necessary for the normal and harmonious flow of Tom Dodd. It is said, it is done, so be it. Om, Om, Om.” Questions and answers concerning what was covered the last two days. If there is no perfect marriage, then the experience is for learning. Perfect marriage exists when two individuals grow together in consciousness and can lock-in in consciousness. Charan Singh, when he was a boy, his grandfather told him that he would get married. Charan Singh said he wanted to renounce the world. The grandfather laughed. Story about the girl who wants to see the great Master and the train stopping inexplicably for her to see Him. The Master said “why do you bother me with such things as stopping the train?” He initiated her and she saw the light and heard the sound current. She was describing all the realms verbally to everybody. They begin to realize that she is a very unusual person. Just then the grandson comes in to pay respects and the grandfather said “there is your wife.” The grandson says “if she can follow me all the way up in the inner realms, they she can be my wife.” They sat down and meditated and the girl followed him everywhere internally. She could follow him to every region inside. Another story about a boy who studied with Yogananda. Adano met him and he had two kids. When he was a boy, he wanted to be a renunciate. Yoganada said “boy, you are going to get married.” The boy wanted to be a minister and teach and he was disheartened. The boy said “if I am going to get married, will you pick the wife for me?” Yogananda said “Divine Mother will pick a wife for you.” After a meditation, Yogananda said “that is your wife over there.” The boy was surprised. After church they went to the restaurant to eat and the boy slipped running up the stairs, the girl caught him “by the seat of his pants.” What can he do? They are married and have two beautiful children. Guidance from those individuals can lead us to the perfect marriage. So perfect marriages do exist, these are just a few instances. It is the love that resonates from inside, outside it seems comical. Masters live through a comedy of life in the outer realm. The Colonel’s wife is not a vegetarian, she likes her smokes, drink, and steaks, but she prepares vegetarian meals for him very carefully. It is not tearing the other person down, it is the mutual respect for what the other person wants to be. Tomorrow we will talk more about the relationship between husband and wife since they form a third cycle of anticipation / anxiety because the male body cannot sense effectively the rhythm of the female body. There are very few men that can do that. In the primitive society, the male body can use the nostril to sense the rhythm of the female body and vice versa. They can even pinpoint when an argument will occur due to being out of phase with each other. First few days of the cycle, the man’s breath is very foul, like being close to a fish wharf. When the woman’s body is changing, it smells the same because the body’s chemistry is involved with salt water. Sodium chloride is throwing off and it comes off through the breath. In the man, the irritability begins in the finger tips, tapping, and swinging their feet. This is the 10-12 day of the cycle change. It is the build up of the sperm movement reaching out for contact or massage. Going to bed groggy and waking up groggy, if you are not married you turn to smoking or drinking or movies. A man can do this, but a female can’t unless they go to a night club, parties, or group meetings. That tension is building up. The male senses this. If they can get together they can release themselves, otherwise they are at variance and the slightest little thing irritates them. Psychological tantrums, he will be abrupt and sharp, he can’t help it. He can’t hold it back. And when she answers back, she is out of phase, and it cuts very sharp. This is something going on between the two mechanisms. Male will take sides with male, and female with female. If there are two couples, both will take no sides, they will withdraw and relax and maybe break the tension. The cyclic rhythms are blocking rational thinking pattern of the individual temporarily. It is also picked up by the children. The youngest child will cry (5 years old) at the biting remark by the male through the subjective telegraphing. The oldest child will make a noise which causes more tension. The mother ends up in the role as a pacifier. The child ends up being used as a “therapy shunt.” If the parents don’t recognize this, the elder child will be more aggressive in distractive actions and will become more stubborn. The younger child will become more timid and a sense of pampering takes over. This is being caused by the cyclic movements inside themselves coming to critical moments. Nutrition is one way at the periods when the body is building up the stresses. If you remove those, then the stress subsides down and doesn’t have a high charge effect. Then the will of the individual can balance it out. Rajasic foods, spaghettis and mexican food, it becomes more stimulating. Don’t eat these foods at the critical moments of the cyclic actions. The male cannot set his rhythm for anytime, the female can by the moon and 28 days. His takes 35-48 days. That’s why he is more aggressive and he seems to be pursuing you to relate to you sexually. When the female is satisfied once, she doesn’t want to be involved again, but the male wants to be involved again because the energy maintains its pull. If the male has not been programmed by shock to what is called “periodical impotent reaction” where this conditions tapers off for him. (Gap in tape.) Both male and female are affected by the cycle of the moon. Females are also affected by the menstrual cycle. There are 13 full moons a year. The male body is driven into more horniness in the summertime because of the 13 full moons in the lunar year, especially July and August. In the commitment of marriage, you have a spiritual locking into one another, the auras are locked to some degree. The woman can also be affected by the man’s dreams, especially if they are violent and aggressive. The male body was the first form that took the shock when it was created, the environmental shock of the Lord creating him, then He created the female form. Adano draws an explanation of the Cosmic Force Field breaking the environmental waves. The moment it triggers off, it hits the first wave, that is a shock, 2nd, and 3rd, like a trinity, when it hits the final, it is reflected back. The 2nd wave stays out because they have to lock in to line themselves up again. Positive goes out and bounced back to the source, the negative goes out with tentacles extended out but doesn’t go back, when they line up the unity of these force trigger together to line up, they make one ?. The male is exposed to the first shock by the positive charge. The female has the nesting drive for anchoring and locking. In the female mechanism, the nesting quality is dominant. The male mechanism is constantly facing shock waves. In 24 hours the male body is exposed to more shock waves than the female body. The female body gets her exposure from interaction, not from competing, she doesn’t have to break the ice and create a new empire or build airplanes or march across Africa to meet Dr. Livingston. It is the male body that does this. The female body comes behind and tries to make semblance out of chaos. Her shocks come from this disjointed chaos. His shocks come from the challenge. The male would like to see the female more aggressive in society because the male body thrives on this aggressive interaction in the environment. So these two are constantly pulling. When the female body takes on that activity, it can be over domineering which will throw off the male mechanism. Patriarchal society is afraid of matriarchal society. The female body is resentful of the over-softness of the male body. This is why men consider themselves smarter than women. The female body is designed to anchor itself to nature by anchoring out, Mother Nature, the nesting principle. The man’s body is designed to take flight from Mother Nature, going into space, “touch me not, I have not yet ascended unto the Father.” The female Masters, Rama Krishna and his Wife. In inner awareness, the Wife was more evolved (inwardly aware and stable) than Rama Krishna. Women need a driving capacity to develop a spiritual life, they are more prone to be spiritual because of her intuitive / feeling nature. He is more relentless once he decides on it and can go through the deprivations in a later stage. Same with Yogananda’s parents, when the wife passed on, then the father was metamorphosing into the qualities of the mother. Adano talks about re-educating by odor. Begin with the new moon and try to relate to your own bodies order, then observe it in the full moon, then last quarter. Then continue onto 35 days. See how the body feels in the nerve endings for 35 days and stimulation from other females. All stresses produce changes in body chemistry that can be noticed. You may start off foul then tapering off to a musky odor. At the highest peak, it will be salty like the ocean. In the spiritual man / woman’s body, these odors become sweeter, the process of love. The desire pattern is slowly shifting to a more aesthetic quality inside. The communication is more tactual, it is not more sight, hearing, or smelling. It is touch. In touch, frequencies are transferred, the tendency to transmit healing functions. When Ananda Moi Ma met Yogananda, she touched him and hugged him and Indian women never embrace. No Swami would embrace a woman because they are working on a tactual level. Yogananda saw her as the Cosmic Mother Principle and she saw him as the Cosmic Father Principle. Touching breaks down the inhibitions and releases the pressure and make him a whole individual for the first time. In the highly spiritual life between Masters and students, there is constant touch. Yogananda would hold disciples hands, touch them, slap them, etc. Darshan is touching with the eyes. As much as man is stimulated by sight and hearing, these senses can touch you. The unity or oneness is impeded by the five senses because we live in the human body. So a Darshan is a very high form of tactual contact with another being. “If I touch the hem of His garment, I will be made whole.” Tactual. You can look at someone and radiate this love and this is tactual contact. There is a danger though in ethical behavior. The most powerful force is lust which trips you up in the tactual relationship. The person may touch another one and certain sensations may come up and they may relate to them as sexual / erotic and make your mind start thinking in terms of lust. Healing force is erotic and will cause itching because it puts energy in a certain place. If the energy released is not bringing on condition such as lust or erotic actions in the body and raising the consciousness to the feeling of joy, then this is a safe factor of relationship. The most significant contact is when two people are in bed without clothes. The nearest thing to that is massage. Swimming is also good. One lusts more in the sun on a dry beach, in the water the drive is tapered down more because you are 80% water and the heat is dissipated more in water. We will get to sublimation after we deal with these forces. A child loves to be fondled and if the parent impedes the child from touching its body, it gets a shock and the child veers off into unhealthy mechanisms. Kiss and make-up is to reach out a touch, spurt is more than the previous spurt of energy. The bodily forces secrete a higher charge after a reconciliation because it is the ever new joy coming through the cells. If the argument gets too intense, laugh and touch the other person.

Adano72_09_1HouseholderWomanQ2NW4 - Yesterday we talked about the male body. Today we are going into the female body, the problems in the female body that make it difficult for the male to realize what is going on when we are married, especially in the householder life. The female body is designed for tactual reaction more than the male body because of the constant contact with children. The female body has to have more tactual experiences, the sense of touch is more developed. The child hurts is leg and the mother rubs it and the child goes an plays again. Because when we live so close to each other, we lose this tactual contact. The male body wants the tactual contact, but what interferes is the daily stress that the male body is confronting. The only way to release this stress is through massage. When first married, this is felt but not usually done. As they have children, that feeling is no longer there. Yet inwardly the feeling is crying out for contact, for this particular reaction. We tend to feel afraid to touch the other person. When in reality, that is where the body needs more tactual contact through massage where subtle forces are being transmitted. Massage is an art by itself and change the whole feeling from love to disgust because in a massage, it is not how much you rub that breaks the pressure, it is the way the motions are brought into action or expression that releases the pressure. There is a peak point of stimulation and after it tapers off and becomes an irritation. It is no longer release, it brings up tension. When you place the finger on the body and apply the pressure and rotating clockwise and moving along the body, this causes the release. Let’s test it so you can understand it. Use the chubby part of the fingertip. Don’t put too much pressure and go in a clockwise action. The first area in the male body that is very sensitive is around the neck, he loves to be massaged there. It takes the stress off the head. The female body is the same, but gets more stress relief from around the neck. In the male body, more stress is relieved from the shoulders. Let’s demonstrate it. Adano demonstrates. The female head part is like the ovum, the neck is therefore more sensitive to stress. The male body is more like the sperm and the impact cushions and the stress is in the shoulder blades through the recoil action. We are banging our heads against psychological problems everyday. Once you realize the structure and the effect of the shock (spermal), then you must use the correct tactual contact and motion to relieve it. First the head, then the spine, especially the sex regions because energy has to rise up back and make contact in the brain in the medulla. The medulla of every human being carries the same amount of stress, the little indent in the back of the head. You can massage that part the same way. Use the thumb and get a good brace on the head. The impact causes the energy to be sent up the spine like a gong (Adano makes a “bong / gong” sound). This causes the eyes to get tired. If you are driving, alternate every hour, try to stretch yourself out every hour to let the blood flow back into the spine. There are four primary techniques to release the stress on the spine (6-7 secondary ones). Everyday you must exercise your hands and fingers so they don’t bend, tap on the meaty part of the fingers. You will need that type of action to control the flow of the energy. Also working on the feet. First work around the kneecaps. Shifting the stress from thumb to each finger in turn. Always start from the kneecap. (Gap in tape). To develop magnetism, you have to know where magnetism enters, you have seven magnetic centers / vortices. The best healers have a rotund tummy because the energies come in the solar plexus. We have the rotation, the tapping, the knuckle pressure, and the shock. There are certain areas called the 20 body part technique that begin with the head first, shoulder, biceps, forearm, wrists, chest, shoulder blades, buttocks, groin, thigh, kneecap, calves, etc. Certain parts respond to certain techniques, for instance, along the spine, punching with the nail responses the highest, then pressure with the knuckle, then tapping, and least is rotation. You have to be very careful with the back and forth action of friction (rubbing hands together) because it builds up heat which reduces sensation. As soon as you feel the heat, stop, and let the heat do the work. After a bath, take a rough towel and rub until the heat builds up. (Gap in tape). It reaches a tolerance point, that’s why you find between the male and female, the daily embrace tends to taper off after a while because its a dry contact, there’s no emulsion or lubricant contact between the male and female. It’s when you have a lubricant contact is when the cells are kept in a higher potency and yearning for each other and the vibratory nature of love is heightened. If you take cream after a while and rub it on your skin (women do this a lot) what is the sensation? The sensation of rubbing cream on the skin is very stimulating because the cells are soft and pliable. So when oil are used throughout the entire body to massage it, it makes the cells more vibrant. That feeling of joy or bliss is increased. Greeks and Romans used baths of scented oil because it increased the sensation of massage. Olive oil goes right through the skin into the blood through osmotic therapy. Weight reduction can be brought on through osmotic massage and works on the cholesterol deposits in the skin. Has to be pure olive oil, no heat, pure cold pressed. Eucalyptus cleans out the lungs by inhaling it. Minerals in the water are designed for illness, not designed for a healthy body, you don’t use them on a healthy body. Swimming in salt water is ok. If you find yourself being turned off from your husband or wife, ego gets the bigger part, we can ease the stress. Familiarity breeds contempt, it is an indication of tolerance levels where it is taken for granted. There is no more sense of strangeness which keeps balance to some degree. (Gap in tape). Male body gets release in competition, challenge, or group activity going off into areas and find some kind of association with the environment that would free it from conflict. It is better to face the stress. Camouflage tends to build up neurosis. Man either ran or fought, subjugated or dominated, primitive to modern. The male body always did this to survive. The greater the camouflage, the greater the neurosis. If you turn around and face and overcome, then it breaks that pattern and releases the stress. That’s why Yukteswar said “face each problem and it will stop bothering you.” Ginseng root stimulates the gonad action and makes the individual feel more virile so he can shut off the feeling of impotency or inferiority. Equivalent to vitamin E, the anti-sterile vitamin. Adriatic hydrocortol herb (sp?) rebuilds the connective tissues. There is another herb that helps builds willpower in the body, you eat one leaf a day to get the effect, the elephant eats it. (Adano can’t remember the name, he takes quite a while to remember it, then remembers it suddenly later in the tape). Adano talks a bit about contraceptives being “against the norm” and “a threat to the norm.” Lust is the hardest of the five forces to overcome. Ego you can overcome, but lust is very hard. It is brought on by an abnorm, by factors the body cannot through off, environmental factors that cause this to exist. Man can control lust if he understands how it is constructed. He is not born lustful, but from the parental factors and nutritional factors. Lust refers to an action outside the married life with your partner. There is no lust between a married coupled. The act of sex is designed for producing children, but does the very first act of sex produce it? The reason why Masters don’t suggest sex is because of what goes into making the fluid, the gonads have a direct link to the medulla oblongata through the heart and endocrine system. This organ is trapping secretion from the brain, brain cells, to make sperm. It takes three months and 3,000 to 4,000 sperms in one secretion. The woman’s brain cells go down every 28 days to create the ovum. The act of procreation is a mental impression stimulated by the mind. If you degenerate the body, the brain, you will pull in a degenerate entity into the world as a baby. Sublimation of the act reverses the brain cells back up through para-physical methods to be reabsorbed into the brain. The early disciplines were not just to thwart the individual.

Adano72_09_3HouseholderPolarityConceptionQ1NW4 - Today we are continuing the study of the householder initiate and the female body forms. Eye contact is very important for the female body. The female body telegraphs most of its feelings through the eyes which is picked up by the expression in the face. That feeling of nesting has a magnetic pull though the eyes to draw to it. The magnetism is low during the menstrual cycle, high before and after and very electric, the eyes can glow. In the male body this is different, the magnetism of the eyes are only strong at night, weak in the daytime, opposite for the female body. There is a fluctuation in the time of the moon. When the moon is full, the magnetism is strong in the eyes of the male body, opposite for female (last quarter). The magnetism can be built up by focusing. When the eye is centered on some specific object without wavering, the magnetism is increased, also by shifting the breath through “magnetic breathing.” This occurs during sex, the breathing gets heavy and deep. Alternate breath technique in yoga (through each nostril one at a time). Magnetism is weak when left nostril is breathing in and the eyes don’t generate a charge (charge is negative). Opposite for right. A spiritual master has recognized the polarization of the body and only generates the charge when breathing on the right charge. He can shift it if necessary for him to work negatively (when the breath is on the right nostril). Since the magnetism shifts all the time by the breathing, it shifts with the position of the eye. This changes every hour and you have to build the magnetism from the positive charge. If there is too much in one nostril, you have to correct it by the focusing of the eyes. The female body is stimulated by sound. You have to listen to the sound in the nostril. Adano takes a survey of left vs. right nostril for men and women in the room. 7 = right. Those pulling in on the left, bring the energy (focus attention) to the right eye. Put the eyeball outward. Keep the eyes steady and don’t blink. If you are breathing through the left nostril and projecting with the right eye, then raise the left hand (so the energy is coming out the left fingertips) and clench the right fist. Begin to feel it rising up through the spine up to the head, this magnetic charge building up. The magnetic field is exactly 17 inches from the body, the first 6 inches is the electrical field, the next 11 inches out is the magnetic field. From then on out, feel the magnetic field around you and its biggest potential is from the tummy. Now as you keep the eyes steady and focus, let the whole face begin to smile. The cells will be electro magnetized now and will polarize. Feel all the cells smiling and to increase the magnetic charge, reach out to grab the person’s hand next to you. Now build up the charge by feeling it passing through the hands, all the way through, you will feel the breath begin to synchronize. Now you will feel a warmth flowing out from the eyes. That magnetic field is becoming in a state of unity and a whole body will start to feel the flow of the magnetic field. Now you nourish the body magnetically this way because it is an electrical polarization in the cells, like a battery hooked into a battery charger, and the whole body is charging itself. Let go of the other person’s hands and bring the two palms together and retain the charge in the body. You are charging the body to its maximum. Once that subtle movement in the spine is felt, the whole body is magnetized. Now if you want to transfer this magnetism to your loved one, then you transfer it from your right hand. Let one male and one female touch the back of the neck of another person. Ok, try somebody else now. Face each other and put the right hand on the back of the other person’s neck. Ok, try somebody else. (Gap in tape). There are Psalms for painless of childbirth. They are mantras designed for the release of the child from the womb without pain. Extrasensory bio-magnetic transference can be perform with the hands and can be used at the highest level for immaculate conception. Hileil was the Master for Jesus’ parents and helped conceive Jesus through extrasensory spermal transfer without contact between Mary and Joseph. Adano explains in detail. So it is not just the two individuals that are involved through a sonic beam. It is a form of the Holy Breath transmitting the sperm to the ovum by sound waves. Doctors know this is possible. Rama’s wife Sita was also an immaculate conception birth thousands of years earlier. Polarization occurs because Sita was a woman and Jesus was a man to balance the force. He was born in the 4th year of BC. Now we are moving up into the aquarian age which will start a new polarization. The chances are that it will be a woman first before a man. So you see the Householder life is a fantastic culmination of all the laws of nature bordering on the human body. We are fortunate to have a human body. From a survival standpoint, you are the only sperm that became you. In terms of self evaluation, you can trust that force that brought you to maturity as human being to make it possible for you to experience God Realization in this body. “Mine is not to reason why, mine is just to do and live.” This is what happened to Elias and Elijah. Story about giving a double portion of the spirit, asking for something for nothing. The Master tricked him and made him works doubly hard. We always ask for more than what we can chew. Nine times out of ten you will rather die choking than let it go because of pride. The Master has to play tricks on you to free you from your ignorance. Story of a guy asking a Master lots of questions for his Thesis, the Master just gave him platitudes and non-sensical answers. He was total distraught. On the last day, the Master asked him “I see that you are working on your thesis. Why are you staying here?” He was blocking all the answers through his intellectual way. The Master was not going to intellectually satisfy him so the Master exhausted the boy. They are intended to make you look at yourself. The answers you are looking for are locked up in the questions. Confirmation is only satisfactory if you can duplicate the result without deteriorating your nature. A true experience will not tear you down and make you feel despondent, it will build you up and leave you in a heightened state of Joy. The aftereffect should be tears of Joy, not tears of sorrow. The boy in Yogananda who saw the stuff that the dog vomited up, Yogananda ate it and made the boy eat it. The boy was surprised to find it had no odor, smell, of taste, but he did have a “2x4 flash of light in his head.” His body was tingling with Joy, which is God. Their jokes are a little too rough. Wise men like to joke now and then, but you don’t want to be the butt of their jokes. A good disciple has no mind of his own, he is like putty in the hands of a Master. For example, Prashad in the Cosmic Kitchen, all the food is blessed. “I would not hesitate to eat it from the trash, even if a roach walked over it. Even the roach is blessed.” The only way you will know it is Prashad is if you pick it up and eat and have one tremendous experience, like a triple dose of LSD. If you don’t feel something you are blocking and you are just delaying the experience like a delayed time bomb. It goes off when you hit a low point.

Adano72_09_4HouseholderElectricalEntitiesQ1NW4 - The married life is not like the fairy books. Living happily ever after doesn’t exist. What exists is a human being, male, that goes out in constant flow to drive, reach out, penetrate, to challenge. The female body is the nesting force, the gathering, the collecting action. Then these two forces are in direct opposition in their perfectness and at the same time they are uniquely blended when they learn to merge. Problem with overfamiliarity in a relationship can cause “turning off” and touching someone else can “turn you on.” A little sense of respect is sufficient to keep the love going. We do need to realize that the man lived in one room and the woman in the other in the old days. This continued the courtship. Not taking the mate for granted. You can’t have a school to train somebody to be pregnant. Story about ostracism in societies about being chaste. The primitive people could see auras and see what had happened. Story about maintaining bloodlines in Hawaii by inter marrying (inbreeding) royalty initially to “carry the force” to new areas. Experimenting outside the married cycle can produce mental imbalances. A married man is committed to his wife, but sees a beautiful woman and can’t do anything about it. So he reincarnates and has to fulfill the karmic conditions. If we understand it, we rise above it, if not, we succumb to it. We are constantly discharging brain cells through the spinal column which attracts “entities.” Miscarriages can be causes by several activities, which are karmic to a certain extent. You might have had an abortion in a previous life and now have to live through a miscarriage or death in pregnancy. Some schools of thought say abortions or contraception are not taking life, but the release of energy cannot be destroyed. 22 This is where the saint or the master or religious people come in now to emphasize why in your scriptures there are certain references to these ids (ideas) of spilling the seed or aborting before completion and why a pope would be adamant against trying to accept these ideas of birth control or abortion. They are looking at the deeper aspect of the structure of man and they are looking at the illnesses that will follow in the progeny of man more so than the mere satisfaction of his pleasure and his physical nature at the present state of his need in his environment and the fear of the politician of overpopulation, and under nourishment and lack of education. 23 Man will never be in a state of lack of education, he will never reach the state of total over population, and he will never reach the state where he will destroy himself. Question from audience that can’t be understood. We have to take the words of the masters who have looked at the whole Cosmic Consciousness and see what is behind it and why it is not working out that way and why the ego and the mind would want it to work that way in order to satisfy the type of desires that are generated by the mind and the senses. The mind is involved in the pursuit of pleasure, in the pursuit of sensory stimulation, in the acquisition of material objects, in the release of pent up emotions at the expense of others. And finally, to attain that particular degree of recognition without effort. The mind is in pursuit of that all the time. Now, the mind is not interested if you are hurt to generate compassion unless it threatens the individual to some extent. satisfaction of the sensory nature first. The brain will deprive the body of nutrients to stay alive longer. The mind follows suit. The conscious mind is a good spokesman, but a lousy carry through. The subconscious mind will not allow him. The heart that pumps the blood will not allow the physical mechanism to interfere with the pumping to the heart. Yogis cannot slow down the heart if they are unethical. He has to obey the rules, the yamas and the ni-yamas. The conscious mind is played out on a string by the unconscious mind. The vital organs cannot take the strain of fulfilling the sensory nature. The subconscious mind dominates the conscious mind in terms of behavior. When the sperm blended with the ovum, that was subjective. The daddy did not know which sperm was going to make contact. The subconscious level is the survival power and nourishes the conscious level if it would listen to it. It is your subconscious mind that is dominating you from inside and meditation allows you to sense it. Sex release is in the conscious mind because of stimulation from the outer realm. The male body is stimulated by sight and the female body through sound. Pain and sex are opinions of the mind. After a certain point of pain intensity there is no more pain, the brain goes into a state of shock. You don’t feel anything when you are in state of shock, a state of apathy. The only difference between shock and cosmic consciousness is that the heart is not beating as slow as in cosmic consciousness. Cosmic consciousness is cosmic apathy, alive and enjoying it all. He can accept his apathy. In shock, you can’t accept your apathy. You are suddenly told that your actions were very, very cruel actions, but you don’t recognize them as cruel actions. You thought they were good actions, but they were degenerate actions. You are in shock, you can’t do nothing, semi paralysis. Shock is not a lasting effect, it is temporary and sublimates itself. You refuse to remember because of the pain, because you are afraid to face yourself. You are suffering for biological procrastination to face the shock. Your ability to handle it is not mature… Adano discusses the science of the book of Psalms. The Thanksgiving retreat will be on the science of the Psalms. Adano talks about the Psalm of Journey (104th). Use of Psalms in the birth of Jesus for a painless childbirth… The whole structure of the university is based on sound. The major cause of deterioration of the cells is sound. Air conditioning as a sound problem. Sound can build, sound can breakdown, the Walls of Jericho. Back to the male / female body, the discharge and contraceptive methods. Crippled people are the result of people wasting the vital fluids prior to marriage. The parents cause this problem. There is no such thing as fate, there is destiny / karma, but no fate. Karma, every actions has a reaction, the action must complete itself and some destination in time. It is a just law, what you sow, you reap. In marriage, the auras blend and correct the entity field and it comes into the body with a higher degree of understanding than before… Entities (Jinn as in Genie) can give powers in exchange for blood, use of the body, offsprings of the body, or discharges from the body. He can also challenge your life because you are using him as a slave. The story of Hazrat in the Autobiography of a Yogi. Solomon beat Osmodius by using Lucifuge Ruficale, the entity that gave Solomon wisdom in exchange for worshipping him after the 12th year. The elementals brought the gold up for the temple of Solomon, the 12th year Solomon pulled a switch on him by going into meditation and saying “no man worship Lucifuge Ruficale except god.” Solomon built a psychotron, two pyramids standing on each other, as the seal of Solomon. Solomon was trapped by lust, he had 363 wives. He married the maidens of the Perizods on his way up to Satch Kand. Perizod comes from the word Paradise, the nymphs that live around the gates of Paradise and drain the male body during the night through nocturnal emissions… The commune life is not new to the commune life, there are those who do nothing. The Pope saw this and took reincarnation out of their books, only the priests were allowed to have them, then the monks were the custodians of it, then only the Jesuits. They have the toughest disciples to crack you since they are designed as a military organization… Adano talks about initiate wedding vows that are designed to bring higher beings onto earth to bring other people out of their mental dilemmas and move backward to the oneness of the spirit.

Adano72_09_6HouseholderBodyofWomanQ1NW4 - 1:28 It has the realization that it is Soul in the end. See Man don’t have a Soul, he is Soul but he’s been programmed that he’s got to save it and in the process of trying to save it, he’s losing it, but in discovering that he is humanly the expression of the Divine Principle, he will discover his Soul and in the discovery of his Soul he will be a better being. He can’t be a better being if he’s trying to save something that he doesn’t have. Audience: How about eyes (inaudible)? Adano: The first thing between a male and a female is the transmission of one’s feeling through eyes. “The eyes are the windows of the Soul.” Now we telegraph by our eyes. You see you sit down in a room and you look around and what are you really telegraphing with your eyes to the female or to the male, “Do you see me? Do you see me? Recognize me? Where did I know you?” and actually you’re not conscious of your saying that. Subjectively you’re saying that because you are looking for a kinship with some individual in that room. You are looking for something that is an intimate bond because you are searching and reaching out for something that you can relate to. This kinship or intimacy is telegraphed by the eyes and once it’s picked up by the other individual and is telegraphed back by the eyes, the first expression on the face is a smile, you don’t know why, because you have telegraphed intimacy. Now not intimacy in terms of the sex act, intimacy in terms of being recognized or knowing that you are relating to each other and that you can trust now someone in that room who when you walked in were strangers to you, now you feel a sense of affinity with some individual in the room and before you know, that smile and then the gradual magnetic pull. 1:30 Audience: Is this intimacy being telegraphed based on past lifetimes? Adano: Yes, because you see life is in each one of us, the life energy is each one of us, it’s telegraphing. Now we say the eyes are the window of the Soul so we are Soul essentially, we don’t have a Soul. Now it’s very difficult for an individual to realize that he lived before because he doesn’t have a memory of it. You see memory is the gap, memory is the agony, memory is the thing we don’t want to die. We’re afraid to die because we lose our memory, we’re afraid we’re going to lose every identification with this physical world. Well let’s say for one moment you don’t lose your memory and you’re born with your total memory, then there is no agony, the only agony would be a loss of memory. Let’s say you’re born having total memory of who you are and what you are and whenever you’re ready to leave the frame you’re still carrying the memory, then there is no loss because what man is looking for God, he’s looking for the memory of his existence in God and having no such experience, seeks it in many techniques, even in drugs to get that experience to remind him of himself that he is identified in God, you see? Now if he gets the memory and memory doesn’t stop, then that’s the total awareness. 1:32 When we say we’re going back to God, what are we really saying to ourselves? We are trying to recapture the memory of having been identified with that source at one time because we feel some way along in the consciousness that we have strayed or dropped away from that source, that’s a memory. If ever you think that you were separated from the source or you dropped away from that source, it was only in terms of memory because you don’t have an actual relationship until you recall it or until you live through the experience… (end of tape).

Adano72_09_7HouseholderAdamandEveQ1NW4 - 1:08 Now Cain and Abel, these are two forces in this mechanism. Humility and egoism, these are the two forces locked up in man which are the offsprings of reason, logic, and feeling. Adam is logic and reason, Eve is feeling, therefore they have an offspring called now ego, his name is Cain and in counterbalance because ego is greater than humility, it’s called a child of God. God is a super-ego. Didn’t know that eh? Yes, you see Cain was called a child of God, the superego. God is the superego and the lower ego is Cain so Abel is humility. That is something that grovels in the dirt so Abel was someone who found to be of a lower nature that had to bow down in activity. Now these two forces are working inside. Ego will always try to destroy humility, will always try to make a foot-mat out of humility. Any person who is humble and doesn’t try to stand up and act in a passive way, you’ll always find an egotistical person trying to take advantage of them because they do not like to see passive, humble people, so the egotist will always try to bang their heads in or smash it in. So Cain is ego and Abel is humility. 1:10 Now Abel is struck out by the ego and once it’s struck out by the ego, now the human body takes on its particular dominant tendency. The dominant tendency of the male will appear because ego has struck out humility and the dominant tendency of the female may appear because Cain has struck out, or ego has struck out humility out of it. So when a male or a female appear as two distinct forms, ego is the primary cause to give them their distinctness. The male ego and the female ego gives their distinctness in form and sets them apart. Now this is what the psychiatrist is trying to tell you, you must hold onto. Hold onto your ego, inflate it up, pump it up like a balloon because it’s all you got, but the Saints don’t tell you that because the ego tries to fool itself by lulling the senses to sleep to experience pleasure. That’s why they say “Cain knew his wife in the land of Nod” and to know someone as we say this is, you can’t know them intellectually and if you use the word “know” to mean sexual, that is to indulge in pleasure. So the ego in man or woman dulls the senses which puts it in the form of sensory suspension to heighten or stimulate the feeling of pleasure and the pleasure comes on in that state. 1:12 So the individual begins to realize that his ego, that part of his nature that is dominating him, is marked once his humility has gone out of him. Now it says when Cain killed Abel the Lord says, “Vengeance is mine, no one kill Cain.” Well naturally, Adam is reason, Eve is feeling, Abel is humility, Cain is ego, which other force is dominant in the body now that can destroy ego? Greed can’t do it, anger can’t do it. If they try, they have a right, but they “dare not raise their hand.” Lust dare not raise his hand, neither love. “Vengeance is mine sayeth the Lord. I will deal with him.” I, the I AM, will deal with ego because “I AM that I AM” and the ego is only an I AM and it’s not the I AM, I AM. He’s got to learn who’s the real I AM and He’s going to deal with him and show him who is the big I AM in this whole shebang. So this is where the ego has to come to learn its lesson. “I will deal with him. No one lay a hand, not even Will. That means the Christ. Not even the Christ can lay a hand, that’s the Will because Will must submerge to My Will. Even the Christ has to say, “Thy will be done.” The I AM that I AM’s will must be done. It’s Sat Purush, the God-self. So even the Christ in itself cannot chastise. 1:14 But it is said, “The Lord has given the power unto the Son” to perform the action. That means the Will is empowered as a force within the body to make correction over all the dominant failures of this mechanism. Most of all over ego, which is Cain, because ego kills. Ego is self destructive and only Will as a dominant force can put it back in its place, but this permission to put it back in place must come from the I AM self. That’s why “unto the Son is given that power.” With the permission of the I AM, the will can then correct ego, but until that time the Will cannot even take upon Itself to chastise or correct ego. Audience: Does that mean that you cannot come to God Realization through humility? Adano: Wait a minute, wait a minute, humility was killed by ego. How is it going to atone, how is it come back? We will come to God by humility. Remember this, God accepted the sacrifice of humility over the sacrifice of ego. Cain is ego, Abel is humility, and Abel’s sacrifice was accepted. It does not say that man does not come to God by humility. Your ego can knock out your humility. 1:16 When it knocks it out, it finds out that is not the way to come to God by ego. You must come by the way of humility to God, but because ego has already done the damage of taking upon itself to dominate the lower functions of the body and assert its superiority over humility, Will could not take upon itself and correct it because Will is the next dominant force. Anger, lust, greed are not dominant forces over ego. You see? Will is a dominant force over ego, but he could not do it upon itself. Therefore it had to call upon the I AM-ness. The I AM-ness has to come in and says, “No one lay a hand.” In this whole hierarchy, no one of these functions there take upon themselves the law into their hands to punish ego. “I alone will punish ego” and He branded it. They said, “the mark of Cain was placed upon him apart to sort him out.” So the ego nature would now be recognized as a force to be dealt with from the I AM-ness, but the Will was then given the power by the I AM-ness to redeem the ego. By redeeming the ego, the ego would have to suffer the very same punishment which he administered to the brother humility. 1:18 He would be forced to come into the position of humility to be redeemed by Will because Will is a dominant force and if Will takes upon itself to be the ego force, backed up by the I AM-ness behind it, what power has ego got but to become humble? He’s put in the same role, he’s put to walk in the shoes of humility by Will backed up by I AM-ness, but before that if Will was to take the power into its own hand or take the law into its own hands and try to chastise ego, then Will is worse off than ego is. That’s why the I AM-ness says, “No one not even Will,” that’s the Christ-self, “dare not do it.” “I alone will deal it and I give the Will the power.” Now He gives the Will, He has to pass this mantle, this force, this transference. It’s only when the Will is in alliance with the Divine, then chastisement of the ego is a genuine punishment, a genuine correction. Therefore the ego will now learn through humility. Until that time it could not learn it, willpower will try to imitate ego. Therefore the Will will always say, “Thy will be done” but Thy Will is My Will in action. So the two are one for the first time, bringing ego down to its knees and thus making an egoless individual which is a very, very humble individual, but of the highest caliber. So once the ego is reduced to its true humility, then its way back to God is guaranteed. Do you see it now? 1:20 Audience: That’s why people after they first find Christ, they have a spiritual explosion, a psychological explosion, isn’t it? Adano: Alright, their ego is suddenly squelched. The Cain in them has suddenly turned around to become Abel because they have been exposed to Will allied with the I AM-ness, which is the Christ, allied with God. Their own inner nature has now been transmuted. Now they are brought into the garden to feast. With that divine quality, they partake of that new life. So Jesus says, “If I be lifted up, I draw all other men to Me.” If the Will be aligned with the I AM-ness, then ego, lust, greed, humility, and all these different forces will be all be transmuted and changed. Then we have a new being for the first time. So your Garden of Eden is the spiritual psychology and behavior of Man and as you understand it, you begin to see now that the Tree of Life is up in the head, the real brain, and the pseudo-brain is the Solar Plexus. So the Land of Nod, remember it’s sleep, sensory shutdown, which has to do with the ego. Ego goes in to a form of sleep like hypnosis to seek pleasure. Now you want to see how your mind tries to be pleasurable. What is the basic gestures of pleasure? Hmmm? The basic gesture of pleasure (Adano breathes in), you have to pull yourself in. 1:22 If you smell something, don’t you tend to go into a reverie state? Something similar to sleep. That means you want to shut out everything and go into a state of sleep to really experience the depth of it. So when you’re thinking deeply, you’re having a form of union and you’re having a form of pleasurable sensation. So the ego gets its highest pleasurable sensation in a pseudo form of sleep, “nod,” like if all the senses are now starting to heighten themselves by closing in. Audience: That’s so interesting, I’ve experienced that kind of pleasure and I see now why… Adano: But that pleasure… but it’s not something bad. Don’t go knocking it, it’s just because that’s the mechanics of it. Audience: We want to get rid of that, don’t we? Adano: You want to understand it to use it differently. You don’t want to use your ego to gain pleasure through sensory suspension. You want the ego to gain joy by transcending sensory suspension. That’s what meditation becomes now. One is joy and one is pleasure. Sensory pleasure, the ego can go into it and quiver. Joy is that transcendency where there are no guilt complexes, where there are no sensations of self-deterioration. 1:24 So by focusing at the point between the eyebrow, which is another form of nodding, but there’s a big difference between this type of nodding and the sensual nodding. Sensual nodding, or sensual sleep, eventually ends up as sleep. Meditation is a conscious nodding that which you put yourself in a conscious position to merge with the joy that will come to the body from the sensory nature after eight hours of sleep. The same pleasure that will come to the body, the same sensation of recharging that will come to the body, after eight hours of sleep by pleasurable shutdown in a state of nodding, in an unconscious way, this sensation now is heightened and rejuvenating and can come about in about ten minutes, five minutes. 1:25 That’s why Jesus says, “None come unto the Father but by Me” and “Come unto Me all ye that travail and are heavily laden and I will refresh you.” We must go now by the true door to shutdown the effect of the ego over our cells and revitalize our cells with the Divine Will allied with the I AM-ness in our cells, then we truly have not pleasure from the sensory nature in the form of pseudo sleep, but we have now true joy, true revitalization of the body by conscious suspension brought on by meditation. Therefore the Saint eventually lives in a fatigue-less state, He doesn’t care for sleep no more. Sleep is nodding like Cain going into the Land of Nod and knowing his wife, knowing pleasure, knowing his negative force field or his female force field, the pleasurable sensation of shutting down. Whereas now the ego is not doing that no more, it’s aligning itself with Will, you see, and then becoming joyful. 1:27 Audience: Well when you know something and seem to know it here, is this really still reason? Adano: In your solar plexus in the pit of your stomach they say, “I know something in the pit of my stomach.” That is a pseudo knowing. It’s not a real knowing. Audience: So it’s not intuition? Adano: It’s not intuition. Audience: You can meditate though for a long time where things are going on and you’re expecting in your mind that you should know that things are going on, but they’re going on and you don’t know, right?
